nasb.text: Nathan then said to David, “You are the man! Thus says the Lord God of Israel, ‘It is I who anointed you king over Israel and it is I who delivered you from the hand of Saul.

esv.text: Nathan said to David, “You are the man! Thus says the Lord, the God of Israel, ‘I anointed you king over Israel, and I delivered you out of the hand of Saul.

cnv.text: 拿單對大衛說：“你就是那人！耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：‘我膏立了你作以色列的王，把你從掃羅的手裡救了出來，

ccb.text: 拿单对大卫说：“那人就是你！以色列的上帝耶和华这样说，‘我膏立你做以色列的王，从扫罗手中救你，
